steps.title: Identify the geographic contrast
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that most studies occurred in North America with similar characteristics, contrasting with Brazil's different environmental context, which produced the opposite finding.

steps.title: Determine the logical completion
steps.content: The explanation must account for why a different setting produces a different relationship direction. Choice B provides this—environmental circumstances differ and affect the association between dissolved organic carbon and mercury. The others address measurement precision, scope, or absolute values, not environmental causation. This matches choice B — B is correct.
